title: Rules and regulations
doc_html:
§1660.8. Rules and regulations

            The commissioner may adopt rules and regulations in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act as are necessary to implement this Part.

            Acts 2021, No. 192, §1.
doc_text:
§1660.8.  Rules and regulations
The commissioner may adopt rules and regulations in accordance with the
Administrative Procedure Act as are necessary to implement this Part.
Acts 2021, No. 192, §1.
